name: Cantucci Hazelnut Biscotti
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350°F.
2. Mix dry ingredients (except the nuts) together in a bowl.
3. In a separate bowl, mix the liquids.
4. Combine the liquids with the dry ingredients until the dough is stiff. Do not overmix.
5. Stir in the nuts.
6. Shape the dough into 2 flattish logs, each 3 inches wide and approximately 15 inches long.
7. Place the logs on a buttered cookie sheet.
8. Bake for 20 minutes at 350°F.
9. Remove from oven and let cool to the touch.
10. Using a bread knife, slice the log diagonally into 1/2-inch slices.
11. Place the pieces back on the cookie sheet, side down.
12. Bake again for 15 minutes until the cookies are golden brown (turn slices over halfway through the second baking).
Makes 4 dozen Calories: 92 Fat: 2 grams
